rawOutput:
<Column>
  <Text variant="heading">选择方案</Text>
  <Row>
    <Card>
      <Column>
        <Text variant="section-title">免费版</Text>
        <Text variant="price">¥0</Text>
        <Text variant="body">基础功能，适合个人使用</Text>
        <Button variant="ghost" onTap="selectFree">选择</Button>
      </Column>
    </Card>
    <Card>
      <Column>
        <Text variant="section-title">专业版</Text>
        <Text variant="price">¥99</Text>
        <Text variant="body">高级功能，适合团队协作</Text>
        <Button variant="primary" onTap="selectPro">选择</Button>
      </Column>
    </Card>
    <Card>
      <Column>
        <Text variant="section-title">企业版</Text>
        <Text variant="price">¥499</Text>
        <Text variant="body">全功能，适合大型企业</Text>
        <Button variant="secondary" onTap="selectEnterprise">选择</Button>
      </Column>
    </Card>
  </Row>
</Column>
